heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 10905 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1995.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “to carry out this chapter such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1995” for “$1,500,000 for fiscal year 1990, $3,000,000 for fiscal year 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1992, 1993, and 1994 for carrying out this chapter”.Pub. L. 103–2521990— substituted “are authorized” for “is authorized”, inserted “, $3,000,000 for fiscal year 1991, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1992, 1993, and 1994” after “1990”, and directed the substitution of “fiscal year” for “each of the fiscal years 1987, 1988, and 1989, and”, which was executed by making the substitution for “each of the fiscal years 1987, 1988, 1989, and” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 101–501

Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective , but not applicable to Head Start agencies and other recipients of financial assistance under the Head Start Act ( et seq.) until , see , set out as a note under .Pub.
